title: War in Iran: The uncertain aftermath of US and Israeli military dominance
subhed: One week after the launch of Operation Epic Fury, Israel and the United States can claim numerous successes, with no major losses. However, they still have not set a clear objective, as the situation in the region grows increasingly chaotic.

title: Middle Eastern countries suffer vastly different death tolls as the conflict spreads from Iran
subhed: More than 1,000 people have been killed in the region since February 28, when the US and Israel started a war against Iran, with the majority of casualties being reported in Iran and Lebanon.

title: Two more suspects charged in the death of far-right activist in Lyon
subhed: Two men aged 22 and 26, suspected of taking part in the brawl that preceded far-right activist Quentin Deranque's death, were placed in preventive detention on Friday.

title: Paris' Museum of Decorative Arts recreates a day in the life of the 18th-century elite
subhed: This exhibition invites visitors to experience the French art de vivre of the aristocratic and bourgeois elites on the eve of the Revolution. Through a room-by-room recreation of an 18th-century mansion, each space is furnished according to the tastes of the era.

title: Thomas Piketty: 'In the face of Trump's militaristic drift and looming disaster, Europe must equip itself to have global influence'
subhed: Following the intervention in Venezuela, the war against Iran launched by the US president signals yet another admission of weakness by the United States, observes the economist in his column. This military agitation primarily serves to bolster the US economy.

Iranian school hit by air strike: Le Monde's investigation confirms many civilian victims, including children
subhed: Videos obtained and analyzed by Le Monde confirmed that the bombing of a school in Minab, Iran, on the first day of joint US-Israeli strikes on the country, caused many civilian victims, including children.

title: War in Iran: Verified images show scale of Tehran's response and wide range of targets
subhed: Since the Israeli-American airstrikes on Iran on February 28, the Islamic Republic has launched a large-scale retaliation against numerous targets across the Persian Gulf and as far as the Mediterranean. Videos recorded on the ground and satellite images help measure the number and extent of these strikes.
byline: By Poline Tchoubar and Fabien Leboucq

title: War in Iran puts political pressure on both isolationist Vance and interventionist Rubio
subhed: Neither the US vice president nor the secretary of state stands to gain from a show of military force that lacks a clear strategy and runs counter to the MAGA doctrine. The conflict is primarily Donald Trump's, who appears unconcerned about his political legacy.
